title: ANC - 3b.-Change ANC from Adaptive to Standard and vice versa during call when Transparency is ON before call
scenario: Verify ANC can be switched between Adaptive and Standard during an active call when Transparency was ON before the call, with appropriate popup and post-call behavior.
steps: Start/join a call with ANC set to Adaptive or Standard and Transparency ON.
Tap Transparency toggle during call – a popup should inform that it's unavailable.
Switch ANC between Adaptive and Standard – should be allowed.
Leave the call – ANC remains ON with the selected value; Transparency becomes accessible again (OFF on Emu/Osprey/Tern, ON on Lark/Peregrine).
Toggle ANC and Transparency modes – user can switch between them normally.
expected: User can change ANC from Adaptive to Standard (and vice versa) during an active call when Transparency mode was ON before the call. After the call, ANC stays ON with the selected value, Transparency becomes accessible again, and the user can switch between ANC and Transparency modes normally.
